task_completion.description: Verify that EdrawMax is opened and a UML deployment diagram is being created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with a drawing canvas open.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the five required device nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas contains node shapes (typically 3D boxes) labeled 'Client Browser', 'Web Server', 'Application Server', 'Database Server', and 'Cache Server'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct artifacts are deployed within the Web Server and Application Server nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifact shapes labeled with 'Nginx' and 'React' are inside the Web Server node. Artifact shapes labeled with 'Spring Boot', 'Inventory Service', and 'Order Processing Service' are inside the Application Server node.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct artifacts are deployed within the Database Server and Cache Server nodes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Artifact shapes labeled with 'PostgreSQL' and 'WMS Production Database' are inside the Database Server node. Artifact shapes labeled with 'Redis' and 'Session Store' are inside the Cache Server node.

task_completion.description: Verify that communication paths between nodes are drawn and labeled with the correct protocols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connecting the nodes are visible with text labels containing 'HTTPS' (Client to Web), 'REST' (Web to App), '5432' (App to DB), and '6379' (App to Cache).

task_completion.description: Verify that the diagram is saved as an .eddx file and exported as a .png file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file manager shows 'wms_deployment_diagram.eddx' and 'wms_deployment_diagram.png' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and the canvas, rather than just executing terminal commands to generate files.

integrity.description: Verify that the diagram consists of actual shapes and text elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The elements on the canvas appear as individual editable shapes and text boxes typical of EdrawMax, not a single pasted image or a plain text block.

integrity.description: Verify that the files were exported using the application's native save/export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes are visible in the screenshots, confirming the files were generated by the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Diagrams/wms_deployment_diagram.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Diagrams/wms_deployment_diagram.png. Required Nodes: 'Client Browser', 'Web Server', 'Application Server', 'Database Server', 'Cache Server'. Required Artifacts: 'Nginx', 'React', 'Spring Boot', 'Inventory Service', 'PostgreSQL', 'Redis'. Required Protocols: 'HTTPS', 'REST', '5432', '6379'.
